name: Iron Wire Fruit Basket Black - Threshold™: Traditional Round Wire Bowl, Serving Basket, Fruit Holder, 12" Diameter
description: Update your modern kitchen with this Black Iron Wire Fruit Basket from Threshold™. This round fruit basket makes a great addition to your kitchen counter or dining table. It features a black wire frame design for a sleek modern look. The attractive basket is great for storing fruits, vegetables, breads and other items. Plus, it can be used as a decorative accent on your table when not in use, and spot cleaned for easy care.
